title: Fluent Bit Storage Layer Chunk I/O Retry Exhaustion
dataSources: Fluent Bit storage metrics/logs (`fluentbit:storage`) from internal diagnostics
app: Fluent Bit `storage.metrics on` and stderr forwarded to Splunk
spl:
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentbit:storage" OR (sourcetype="fluentbit:log" "storage")
| search "retry" AND ("error" OR "failed" OR "give up")
| stats count by host, input_name, output_name
| sort -count
description: Storage retries exhausted means on-disk chunks may never reach Splunk.
value: Protects log completeness SLAs for edge and Kubernetes collectors.
implementation: Tune `storage.max_chunks_up` and disk paths; correlate with output plugin errors.
